_note: Example response to GET <FEED_URL>?since=<cursor>&limit=<n>. Return ONLY currently-live messages with seq > since, ASCENDING, at most `limit` of them. seq is server-monotonic and drives the client cursor. Scheduling/expiry (start/end windows) and per-player targeting are enforced SERVER-SIDE — the client just folds what it is handed.

messages.title: Spring is here
messages.body: New seeds have come to the grove. Tend them well!

messages.title: Sorry for the hiccup
messages.body: Thanks for your patience during yesterday's downtime — please enjoy these.

messages.title: We missed you
messages.body: A little something to pick up where you left off.
